**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Changzhou Quncai Drying Apparatus Co., Ltd. presents an extreme case of raw data corruption mixed with an absurd official misclassification. Forensically, it is an 1980s legacy township factory (established 1988 in Changzhou) that has undergone multiple identity mutations. Its extracted historical names (erroneously placed in the 'industry_medium' field) reveal a journey from 'Wujin Sanhekou Camera Parts Factory' to 'Longwei Metal Products', and finally to 'Drying Equipment'. Despite the official registry tagging it as an 'Automobile Complete Vehicle Manufacturer', its true business scope (recovered from the 'other_email' field) centers on basic mechanical processing: manufacturing drying equipment, vehicle accessories, plastic parts, and general hardware. Crucially, the corrected workforce data shows 0 insured employees. This indicates the enterprise is a defunct, dormant shell of an old metal/plastic processing workshop, completely devoid of physical manufacturing capacity today.
